controls.label: Options
controls.threshold_hint: Members below threshold are considered inactive

tooltips.written: Total number of current members who wrote at least one message in the period (including manually excluded).
tooltips.below_threshold: Non-excluded members who wrote messages in the period but did not reach the minimum threshold (→ considered inactive).
tooltips.truly_active: Current members with ≥ {{count}} messages minus manually excluded members with ≥ {{count}} messages.
tooltips.total_polls: Number of polls (no quizzes) in the selected period.
tooltips.total_quizzes: Number of quiz polls in the selected period.
tooltips.poll_participants: Number of current members who participated in at least one poll in the period.
tooltips.avg_poll: Average number of participants per poll (quizzes excluded).
tooltips.avg_quiz: Total votes by all members divided by the number of quizzes in the selected period.
tooltips.own_rights: Shows whether you have admin rights in this channel. Admins can access participant lists, which improves bot detection.
tooltips.st_total: Share of ST members in the total member count.
tooltips.st_truly_active: Share of ST members among truly active members (≥ {{count}} messages, not excluded).
tooltips.st_messages_total: Total messages in the period. Percentage share written by ST members.
tooltips.st_messages_active: Messages from members reaching the threshold. Percentage share from ST members.
tooltips.st_polls: Total poll participations in the period. Percentage share from ST members.

table.name: Name
table.poll_pct_tooltip: Share of polls in the period this member participated in.

first_mention.joined_at_rejoin: Reflects the most recent join. Earlier joins are not accessible via the Telegram API.
first_mention.earliest_is_joined: Earliest record based on join date
